title: nephrodium pusillum
intro: Nephrodium pusillum, also known as the small spleenwort or maidenhair spleenwort, is a species of fern native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium pusillum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, and can be dried and made into capsules or powders for convenient consumption.
